title: hearth.router.decision v1
description: Hearth AI router selection event. Published each time the router picks a model for a request — enables deer-flow to track fallback rates, cost distribution, and model health.

models_tried.description: All models attempted in order before success (for fallback tracking)

intent_class.description: Device command / media command / hardware query / general / unknown

was_fallback.description: True if primary model failed or timed out
